_note: Macro calendar for Kronos Trading System. Updated by human weekly. Module 3 applies a symmetric ±4H blackout around each event timestamp. Timestamps are UTC Unix seconds. Verify all dates before each event — especially FOMC/CPI/NFP which may shift due to US federal holidays.
name: _METADATA
notes: Do not delete this entry. Ignored by MacroCalendar (timestamp=0 is never within 4H of current time in normal operation).
